https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IAY4XI7KZd4

I leave this as a declaration of intent so no one will be confused.

Number one: Sic vis pacem, para bellum. Latin. The boot-camp sergeant made us recite it like a prayer. Sic vis pacem, para bellum - "If you want peace, prepare for war."

Number two: Frank Castle is dead. He died with his family.

Number three: In certain extreme situations, the law is inadequate. In order to shame its inadequacy it is necessary to act outside the law. To pursue... natural justice. This is not vengeance. Revenge is not a valid motive, it's an emotional response. No, not vengeance. Punishment.
